text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fatigue has gotten the better of Agnes Tachyon,
so I decide to let her rest in the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fatigue sure is a nuisance, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'll do that. Wake me up at a reasonable
hour.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ta-ta for now, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wh-where the heck am I?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Such a big space! And this air... it's oddly tranquil.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Considering these circumstances... perhaps this is
a dream?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case... I must be lucid dreaming. Hm,
very interesting.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In a dream, any impossibility becomes a
possibility, no?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
For example, speed beyond the limit... I can
simulate the experience here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
By doing so, I could bring that sensation and
knowledge back into the real world!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This would prove a magnificent discovery for my
research!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I should begin testing out a number of
things!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh! I'm... I see... I've woken up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... My memory of the sensation is a bit
hazy, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How exhilarating! Wonderful! This will surely help
with my future research!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Trainer! Are you here? You've got to hear
this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she had a good dream. I don't really
understand what she was talking about, but I'm
glad to hear she's feeling better.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Should... be...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It should be... Gah?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Argh! I lost grasp of my lucid dream! And I wasn't
even able to accomplish anything!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This isn't fair... Why couldn't I just stay asleep
longer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's like I've been offered a feast only to have it thrown away before my very eyes...
